name: Asagami Corporation
summary: Asagami Corporation provides logistics services in Japan. The company offers warehousing services, such as deposition, consulting, and customized services; harbor services, including marine transportation, container handling, and customs clearance; land transportation services; and third party logistics services comprising logistics network design, and warehousing and transportation services. It also provides newspaper, New Year's card, and wedding card printing services; and air cargo services consisting of air cargo forwarding, customs brokerage arrangement, and packaging and crating services. In addition, the company offers information technology logistics management services, such as transaction and inventory management, consolidation, continuous move management, carrier management, cargo/carrier matching systems, and data exchange with ERP/SCM software through global logistics network. The company was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Asagami Corporation is a subsidiary of OA Corporation.
